name: Fruit Basket Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Finely chopped CA dried figs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the finely chopped dried figs with the yogurt.
2. Add the canned crushed pineapple (drained) and nutmeg to the mixture.
3. Chill until serving time.
4. Spoon over fruit salad.
5. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
